title: FAMILY PROGRAMS - 211info
text: IRCO PACIFIC ISLANDER AND ASIAN FAMILY CENTER FAMILY PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support, prevention, and intervention services for domestic violence survivors. 8040 NE Sandy Boulevard Suite 200 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Survivors of domestic violence Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 235-9396 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 235-9396 Main phone Program phone (503) 235-9396 Tina Do [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement. IRCO has language resources available to ensure that clients can speak with someone in their own language for all programs. AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 12 and 72 Services: Spouse/Intimate Partner Abuse Counseling Spouse/Intimate Partner Abuse Prevention Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH ACADEMIC SUPPORT AND PARENT ENGAGEMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH NAVIGATION HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY RENTAL ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE FOR FAMILIES WITH CHILDREN INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ASIAN AND PACIFIC ISLANDER DEVELOPMENT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S PROGRAMS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SERVICES AGAINST EXPLOITATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH MENTORING LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - GANG PREVENTION AND INTERVENTION UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
